title: Top 10 Herbal Ointments to Overcome Chills Quickly
description: Cinchona officinalis cream is used to help people with chills. This cream contains a compound called quinine, which comes from the Cinchona tree. The quinine helps to reduce the fever that causes chills. When you have a fever, your body tries to fight off an infection. But if the fever is too high, it can make you feel weak and shivery. The quinine in the cream helps to lower the fever, making you feel cooler and more comfortable. It also helps to reduce the amount of mucus in your bod...
